See It. Want It. Order It.

Our Food

Cơm Gà — Chicken Rice
Cold-poached chicken over fragrant rice with ginger oil, fresh herbs, and dipping sauce. Our signature dish.
Gỏi Gà — Chicken Salad
Tender chicken tossed with cabbage, roasted peanuts, fried shallots, and house vinaigrette.
Phở Gà — Chicken Pho
Rice noodles in a clear aromatic chicken broth with green onions, cilantro, and Vietnamese coriander.
Bò Né — Sizzling Steak & Egg
6 oz ribeye on a sizzling cast-iron skillet with sunny-side-up egg, house pâté, and a crispy baguette.
Chả Giò — Egg Rolls
Crispy golden rolls filled with seasoned pork, shrimp, and vegetables. Served with fresh herbs and dipping sauce.
Bún Măng Vịt — Duck Bamboo Soup
Tender duck simmered with bamboo shoots in a fragrant broth. Served with vermicelli, fresh herbs, and dipping sauce.
Cà Phê Sữa Đá — Vietnamese Iced Coffee
Strong Vietnamese drip coffee over sweetened condensed milk and ice. Bold and perfectly rich.

Our Story

More Than
a Meal

In Vietnamese culture, food is how we show love. Every bowl of Cơm Gà, every pot of pho — it carries the warmth of family kitchens and generations of tradition that no recipe book can fully capture.

Com Ga Houston brings that same heart to Olathe, KS. Our signature cold-poached chicken is prepared fresh every single day. Our broths simmer for hours. Every herb is fresh, every dish made with intention.

We are more than a restaurant — we are a gathering place for the Vietnamese community and for anyone who wants to experience real Vietnamese cooking.
